channel.title: Calcitriol on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Calcitriol on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Calcitriol (activated Vitamin D) increases dementia (however, regular D decreases it)
item.description:
• Vitamin D supplementation worsens Alzheimer’s progression: Animal model and human cohort studies
      • Note: Calcitriol is normally prescribed for Kidney problems and some Cancers
      • Major flaws in 2022 rumor that vitaminD worsens Alzheimer’s dementia: Nothing was done correctly in this study

Vitamin D supplementation worsens Alzheimer’s progression: Animal model and human cohort studies

Aging Cell. 2022;00:e13670. https://doi.org/10.1111/acel.13670

Rai-Hua Lai1 | Chih-Cheng Hsu2’3’4’5 | Ben-Hui Yu3 | Yu-Ru Lo3 | Yueh-Ying Hsu1 | Mei-Hsin Chen1 | Jyh-Lyh Juang1’6 juang@nhri.edu.tw

item.title: Calcitriol (active Vitamin D) prevents and treats COVID (with Chronic Kidney Disease in this case)
item.description:
• Vitamin D for Recovery of COVID-19 in Patients With Chronic Kidney Disease
      • VitaminDWiki - Chronic Kidney Disease needs Vitamin D: how much, what kind - many studies

Vitamin D for Recovery of COVID-19 in Patients With Chronic Kidney Disease

Front. Nutr., 15 June 2022 https://doi.org/10.3389/fnut.2022.930176

Wen-Fang Chiang1,2,3, Po-Jen Hsiao1,2,3 and Jenq-Shyong Chan1,2,3*

1 Division of Nephrology, Department of Medicine, Armed Forces Taoyuan General Hospital, Taoyuan, Taiwan

2 Division of Nephrology, Department of Medicine, Tri-Service General Hospital, National Defense Medical Center, Taipei, Taiwan

item.title: Tiny COVID-19 pilot study found that Calcitriol helped – but not statistically significant
item.description:
• A randomized pilot study using calcitriol in hospitalized COVID-19 patients
      • VitaminDWiki - Getting Vitamin D into your body - chart

A randomized pilot study using calcitriol in hospitalized COVID-19 patients

Bone Volume 154, Jan 2022, 116175 https://doi.org/10.1016/j.bone.2021.116175

Yasmine M.ElamiraHajiraAmiraStevenLimbYesha PatelRanabCarolina GonzalezLopezbNatalia VieraFelicianobAliOmarbWilliam PaulGristcMichael A.Viaa

Highlights

•Vitamin D has potent immunomodulatory effects on innate and adaptive immune system.

•Vitamin D associated actions suppress acute lung injury.

item.title: Macrophages (a white blood cell) can activate Vitamin D without the kidneys
item.description:
Macrophages Control the Bioavailability of Vitamin D and Vitamin D-Regulated T Cell Responses

Front Immunol. 2021 Sep 21;12:722806. doi: 10.3389/fimmu.2021.722806. eCollection 2021.

Daniel Villalba Lopez 1, Fatima A H Al-Jaberi 1, Anders Woetmann 1, Niels Ødum 1, Charlotte Menné Bonefeld 1, Martin Kongsbak-Wismann 1, Carsten Geisler 1

Many portions of the body can activate vitamin D independent of the kidney
Many portions of the body can sem-activate vitamin D independent of the liver
    Fully-activated Vitamin D (Calcitriol) is produced inside and outside of the kidneys – July 2020

item.title: Fully-activated Vitamin D (Calcitriol) is produced inside and outside of the kidneys
item.description:
• Macrophages (a white blood cell) can activate Vitamin D without the kidneys– Sept 2021

  • Brain cells can probably activate Vitamin D without liver or kidney (at least in rats) – Sept 2017

  • Natural Ways to Increase Calcitriol and Activate The Vitamin D Receptor Gene – Oct 2017

item.title: Diabetic eye wounds healed by topical activated Vitamin D (calcitriol, mice)
item.description:
Topical calcitriol application promotes diabetic corneal wound healing and reinnervation through inhibiting NLRP3 inflammasome activation

Exp Eye Res. 2021 Jun 15;108668. doi: 10.1016/j.exer.2021.108668

Yidi Wang 1, Luqin Wan 1, Zhenzhen Zhang 2, Jing Li 2, Mingli Qu 3, Qingjun Zhou 4

Direct application, instead of oral, appears to greatly increase the amount of vitamin D getting to target.
Founder of VitaminDWiki has used unactivated nanoemulsion Vitamin D topically to skin, wounds, gums, etc. since 2017
This study found that fully activated Vitamin D helps heal eye wounds in diabetic rats

item.title: A tiny amount of Calcitiol (activated Vitamin D) for only 4 weeks does not help (sleep apnea in this case)
Kidney patients who happened to be getting high-dose Calcitriol were 9X less likely to die of COVID-19
item.description:
Association of Calcitriol Supplementation with Reduced COVID-19 Mortality in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease: A Population-based Study

preprints.org > life sciences > biochemistry > doi: 10.20944/preprints202104.0173.v1

Joaquim Oristrell * ORCID logo , Joan C. Oliva , Isaac Subirana , Enrique Casado , Didier Dominguez , Andrea Toloba , Patricia Aguilera , Joan Esplugues , Pilar Fafian , Maria Grau *

Calcitriol, the fully activated form of Vitamin D, is typically only available by prescription.

item.title: Active vitamin D (calcitriol) might fight COVID-19
item.description:
Active vitamin D supplementation and COVID-19 infections: review

Review Ir J Med Sci . 2021 Jan 6;1-4. doi: 10.1007/s11845-020-02452-8

Nakhoul Farid 1 2 3, Nakhoul Rola 4, Elias A T Koch 5, Nakhoul Nakhoul 6

Getting Vitamin D into your body has the following chart

item.title: Tiny amount of fully activated Vitamin D does treat psoriasis
item.description:
Oral Vitamin D Therapy in Patients with Psoriasis

Nutrients. 2021 Jan 6;13(1):E163. doi: 10.3390/nu13010163.

Ana Maria Alexandra Stanescu 1, Anca Angela Simionescu 2, Camelia Cristina Diaconu 3

  • 1 Department of Family Medicine, “Carol Davila” University of Medicine and Pharmacy, 050474 Bucharest, Romania.

  • 2 Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology, Filantropia Clinical Hospital, “Carol Davila” University of Medicine and Pharmacy, 050474 Bucharest, Romania.

  • 3 Department of Internal Medicine, Clinical Emergency Hospital of Bucharest, “Carol Davila” University of Medicine and Pharmacy, 050474 Bucharest, Romania.

item.title: Chronic Kidney Disease (stage 3) slowed by 30 ng of Vitamin D and Calcitriol
item.description:
Poor Kidneys need Calcitriol

Click on chart for details

item.title: Active vitamin D levels can be temporarily raised 80 percent with Boron – US Patent
item.description:
Calcium-fructoborate Amazon 5+suppliers Nov 2019

Raises Calcidiol levels by 80% in about 2 hours

US Patent 9,271,994 Pietrzkowski; Zbigniew,

VDF Futureceuticals ==> https://www.futureceuticals.com

Patent is by the Senior Vice President of Research and Development, Discovery and Clinical Science

Sent him an email Nov 10, 2019

Patent was found in Boron Compounds in the Breast Cancer Cells Chemoprevention and Chemotherapy - 2011

" Indeed, calcitriol levels could be increased almost 80% upon the oral administration of a single dose of a boron-containing complex (15-20 mg boron as calcium fructoborate per day) (Pietrzkowski, 2010)"

item.title: Some plants accumulate Vitamin D3 or active Vitamin D3 (calcitriol)
item.description:
A few items from the PDF

  • The concentrations of vitamin D3 in reindeer lichen ~ 4,000 IU per 100 g

  • “The following plants contain vitamin D3 and its metabolites, including calcitriol, in relatively large amounts:

Solanum malacoxylon,

Lycopersicon esculentum

S. tuberosum

S. melongena

Cucurbita pepo subsp. pepoconvar. giromontina

S. glaucophyllum (plants and cell culture)

Nicotiana glauca

Cestrum diurnum

Trisetum flavescens
